## Checklist

**Before merging, make sure the following items are addressed:**

- [ ] [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md) updated with [#ISSUE_NUMBER] and task title
- [ ] Code follows project conventions
- [ ] Docs added or updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Tests added and passing
- [ ] Environment variables documented and updated in all env files
- [ ] Branch is up to date with `develop`/`main`
